page.bodyHtml:
Press Center

Press & News

Official updates, release milestones, and artist-facing highlights for Agust Islandia. This page tracks the public story around releases, catalog growth, queer music coverage, and major artist moments.

Open press release Artist bio Apple Music
2026 Syndication-ready press materials published for outreach and indexing.
2025 Major catalog expansion through musicals, singles, Pride releases, and lyrics.
Focus Queer pop visibility, full-archive documentation, and official release context.

Press Snapshot

Use this page as the official landing point for release milestones, news references, and context around the expanding Agust Islandia catalog.

  • Official press release page for syndication
  • Release milestones linked to core album and lyric pages
  • Artist bio and contact path for coverage inquiries
  • Structured archive supporting indexing and discovery
The Unseen Chorus Gay and Proud Lyrics Archive

Recent Milestones

March 2026 - Official Syndication Release Published

New Press URL: agust-islandia-gay-and-proud-press-release.html

A dedicated syndication-ready press release page is now live with source links covering performance milestones for "Gay and Proud / Gay y Orgulloso" and the broader artist profile.

Open the full release →

October 2025 - The Unseen Chorus Musical Released

Release Date: October 6, 2025

Agust Islandia released The Unseen Chorus, A Gay Musical, a 27-track theatrical work documenting a journey from infidelity through sexual addiction to recovery and redemptive love. The full site now supports the release with official lyrics and track-level pages.

The project addresses hookup culture, anonymous sex, betrayal, divorce, shame, and recovery through explicitly queer storytelling rather than neutralized abstract pop writing.

Read more about The Unseen Chorus →

September 2025 - Gay and Proud Goes Viral

TikTok Milestone: 540,000+ views

The bilingual Pride anthem "Gay and Proud / Gay y Orgulloso" reached major visibility on TikTok and established itself as a defining public-facing release in the catalog.

View release page →

Streaming Milestone - 60,000 Daily Streams

The catalog reached a documented milestone of 60,000 daily streams across platforms, reinforcing that the project is growing beyond isolated single releases into a broader searchable body of work.

Key Releases

  • The Unseen Chorus (October 6, 2025) - 27-track gay musical
  • Gay and Proud / Gay y Orgulloso (September 11, 2025) - bilingual Pride release
  • Swipe Me to the Moon - queer narrative musical project
  • Cowboys EP - queer western subversion and satire
  • Feel Alive and My Fire (Mi Fuego) - singles expanding the public profile

Press Contact

For interviews, media features, Pride festival interest, booking context, and artist information:

Email: agust@arcticsea.com

Press Assets & Context

The site now functions as a structured artist archive with official release pages, lyrics, artist biography, and metadata-backed music entities. That makes it useful both for listeners and for search/indexing systems trying to understand the catalog.

Artist biography Lyrics index Flagship release page Syndication release
